rationale: Same as cart→keplerian — cometary differs only in q/Tp vs a/M but composes the same angular elements. Tightened from the former 2e-7 to 1e-9 along with cart→keplerian; worst-abs at 1024 fuzz rows is 2.8e-10.
Iterative geodetic latitude solve (Bowring). Bit-parity with JAX at 1e-12 across full random sweep; tolerance at numerical precision of geodetic-altitude in km.

Mixed-unit output: distance columns at numerical precision, but angular elements (i, raan, omega, M) emit DEGREES. The previous 2e-7 atol was 4 orders too loose: at 1024 random rows (parity_fuzz, n=128 × 8 seeds, 2026-04-25) worst-abs is 2.8e-10 — driven by composed acos+atan2 ulp on degree-scale angle values. Tightened to 1e-9 with ~3× headroom. (Task #137 investigation closed by observation.)
Spherical output of cart→sph composed of sqrt + atan2 + asin. 1-2 ulp ceiling at angular outputs near 0°/360° wraparound; 1e-11 = ~36 picoarcsec, far below DE440 noise (~10 mas).
Mirror of keplerian→cartesian — same kernel, same precision.
Closed-form keplerian→cartesian via universal-Kepler chi solve for hyperbolic and Newton iteration for elliptic. Bit-parity with JAX at 3e-12 AU on Cartesian outputs.
Inverse of cart→sph. 1-2 ulp angular composition ceiling; 1e-11 AU absolute is ~1.5 mm at 1 AU — far below any physical measurement floor.

Composed pipeline: representation_in → cartesian → frame rotation → origin translation → cartesian → representation_out. Mixed distance/angle output rows; rtol=1e-12 is bit-parity, atol=1e-10 absorbs angular wraparound ulp.

Standalone LT correction — Newton fixed-point + universal-Kepler back-prop. Per 2026-04-22 D5 port: max abs diff 5.3e-14 on aberrated orbit, 9.9e-17 on light-time vs deleted JAX reference. Effectively bit-parity.

Standalone LT correction — Newton fixed-point + universal-Kepler back-prop. Per 2026-04-22 D5 port: max abs diff 5.3e-14 on aberrated orbit, 9.9e-17 on light-time vs deleted JAX reference. Effectively bit-parity.
Scalar n = sqrt(mu / a^3). Bit-parity with JAX implementation.

Composed: LT Newton fixed-point + universal-Kepler back-prop + stellar aberration + ec→eq + cart→sph. Spherical output has the wraparound ulp ceiling at ~1e-10 abs; light-time stays bit-parity (atol=1e-14 day = 1.2 ns); aberrated cartesian matches propagate at 1e-11 AU.

Composed: LT Newton fixed-point + universal-Kepler back-prop + stellar aberration + ec→eq + cart→sph. Spherical output has the wraparound ulp ceiling at ~1e-10 abs; light-time stays bit-parity (atol=1e-14 day = 1.2 ns); aberrated cartesian matches propagate at 1e-11 AU.

Composed: LT Newton fixed-point + universal-Kepler back-prop + stellar aberration + ec→eq + cart→sph. Spherical output has the wraparound ulp ceiling at ~1e-10 abs; light-time stays bit-parity (atol=1e-14 day = 1.2 ns); aberrated cartesian matches propagate at 1e-11 AU.
Mirrors generate_ephemeris_2body for state/lt/cart outputs; covariance path matches propagate covariance tolerance.
Mirrors generate_ephemeris_2body for state/lt/cart outputs; covariance path matches propagate covariance tolerance.
Mirrors generate_ephemeris_2body for state/lt/cart outputs; covariance path matches propagate covariance tolerance.
Mirrors generate_ephemeris_2body for state/lt/cart outputs; covariance path matches propagate covariance tolerance.

Universal-Kepler 2-body with Laguerre-Conway chi iteration (superseded plain Newton, see 2026-04-22 journal entry). 1e-11 AU absolute on Cartesian state, ~1.5 mm — well below n-body propagator (ASSIST) noise.

State path mirrors propagate_2body. Covariance path uses Dual<6> AD to compute Σ_out = J Σ_in J^T per row in one Rust pass. Σ has units of (AU,AU/d)^2 → atol=1e-14 captures covariance precision; rtol=1e-6 absorbs ~6 sig-fig drift from 6×6 matrix multiplication.

State path mirrors propagate_2body. Covariance path uses Dual<6> AD to compute Σ_out = J Σ_in J^T per row in one Rust pass. Σ has units of (AU,AU/d)^2 → atol=1e-14 captures covariance precision; rtol=1e-6 absorbs ~6 sig-fig drift from 6×6 matrix multiplication.
Izzo Lambert solver. Iterative Householder convergence at atol/rtol=1e-10 internally; output velocity vectors match JAX reference at 1e-13 AU/d — bit-parity.
Gauss two-vector velocity, bit-parity.

Gibbs three-vector velocity reconstruction. Bit-parity with JAX/numba reference at 1e-12 AU/d — note Gibbs amplifies input ULPs by ~1e8x on close-spaced triplets, so the parity fuzzer enforces ≥1-day spacing between observation triplets.
Herrick-Gibbs short-arc velocity, same tolerance as Gibbs.
H-G phase function in V band. Pure element-wise; 1e-12 mag absolute is bit-parity (1 mag ≈ 0.4 ulp at f64).
Fused mag+alpha — magnitude stays at bit-parity 1e-12; phase angle absorbs the same small-angle atan2 ulp ceiling as the standalone calculate_phase_angle (atol=1e-10°).
Fused mag+alpha — magnitude stays at bit-parity 1e-12; phase angle absorbs the same small-angle atan2 ulp ceiling as the standalone calculate_phase_angle (atol=1e-10°).

Stable 2·atan2(sqrt(1-cos), sqrt(1+cos)) form. Per journal entry 2026-04-22 (small-angle atan2 ulp ceiling): at large N the abs hits ~1.4e-11° (50 picoarcsec) on small-α geometry. 1024-row fuzz confirms occasional 1.0e-11 deg outliers — bump atol to 1e-10° (~360 picoarcsec) for headroom; far below any measurement noise.
H-G V-band magnitude + per-target-filter delta lookup. Delta precomputed at module-import, so the rust path adds at most 1 fma over the standalone V-band kernel — same precision.

ORCHESTRATION (covered indirectly). MOID = min |r1(t) - r2(t+dt)| over analytical 2-body grid + Brent refinement. Bounded by `propagate_2body` kernel parity (atol=1e-11) plus optimizer xtol. Direct random-fuzz wiring would require SPK kernels in subprocess; deferred.

ORCHESTRATION (covered indirectly). MOID = min |r1(t) - r2(t+dt)| over analytical 2-body grid + Brent refinement. Bounded by `propagate_2body` kernel parity (atol=1e-11) plus optimizer xtol. Direct random-fuzz wiring would require SPK kernels in subprocess; deferred.

ORCHESTRATION (covered indirectly). Meshgrid + time-order filter + batched Lambert per (dep, arr) pair. Bounded by `solve_lambert` kernel parity (atol=1e-13). Direct wiring would require Orbits-quivr round-trip; deferred.

Full Gauss IOD: equatorial→ecliptic rotation, 8th-order poly root finding (Laguerre+deflation), per-root orbit construction. INTENTIONALLY UNWIRED FROM RANDOMIZED FUZZ (see comment in _inputs.GENERATORS): rust Laguerre+deflation and legacy np.roots/LAPACK find different SUBSETS of the 8th-order polynomial's roots on a non-trivial fraction of random triplets — intrinsic to the algorithms, not a kernel bug. Best-root parity holds at ~1e-10 AU when both sides find any |r2|≥1.5 AU root, but ~15% of random triplets show NaN-mismatch (one side rejects the root the other accepts). Tolerances retained for fixed-fixture / manual parity. Epoch atol=1e-6 day = 0.1 s; orbit atol=1e-5 AU = 1500 m.
